reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify New York City middle schools with at least 50 SHSAT offers in 2015-2016.
2. From those schools, keep the New York City middle schools with at least 50 SHSAT offers in 2016-2017.
3. From those schools, keep the New York City middle schools with at least 50 SHSAT offers in 2017-2018.
4. From those schools, keep the New York City middle schools with at least 50 SHSAT offers in 2018-2019.
5. From the remaining schools, keep the New York City middle schools in Queens District 26.
6. Determine whether one of those remaining Queens District 26 schools is named after a scientist, and record the birth year if it is.
7. Determine whether another remaining Queens District 26 school is named after a scientist, and record the birth year if it is.
8. Determine whether the third remaining Queens District 26 school with a reference page is named after a scientist.
9. Return the year the research institute associated with the older qualifying scientist was founded and first directed.
original_final_question: Which New York City middle schools located in Queens District 26 had (1) at least 50 offers to specialized high schools on specialized high school admissions test in every school year from 2015-19, and (2) are named after scientists. In what year was the research institute founded and first directed by the older of these two scientists? Please return the year only. Your response should be in the format [Answer].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: SHSAT offers SY2015-16 >= 50 -> 27 schools (including 4 District 26 schools)
Node 2: SHSAT offers SY2016-17 >= 50 -> 27 schools (including 4 District 26 schools)
Node 3: SHSAT offers SY2017-18 >= 50 -> 28 schools (including 4 District 26 schools)
Node 4: SHSAT offers SY2018-19 >= 50 -> 23 schools (including 4 District 26 schools)
Intersection of nodes 1-4: Schools meeting criterion all 4 years -> 21 schools
Node 5 (School Locations): Filter to Queens District 26 -> 4 schools (Pasteur, Hawthorne, Curie, Ryan)
Node 6 (Wikipedia Louis_Pasteur): Pasteur was a scientist, born December 27, 1822
Node 7 (Wikipedia Marie_Curie): Curie was a scientist, born November 7, 1867
Node 8 (Wikipedia Nathaniel_Hawthorne): Hawthorne was NOT a scientist (novelist)
Note: George J. Ryan has no Wikipedia article and cannot be verified as a scientist
Filter: Scientists only -> Pasteur (born 1822), Curie (born 1867) = 2 scientists
Superlative: Older (earlier birth year) -> Pasteur (1822) vs Curie (1867) -> Louis Pasteur is older
Node 9: Louis Pasteur founded the Pasteur Institute in 1887 and was its first director until his death
